stemHtml: In the event of communication failure in an MNPS airspace, the pilot must:

options.a: continue the flight in compliance with the last oceanic clearance received and acknowledged.
options.b: join one of the so-called “special” routes.
options.c: change the flight level in accordance with predetermined instructions.
options.d: return to the flight plan route if it is different from the last oceanic clearance received and acknowledged.
